Drop the Navisworks-2024 build of Dyncamelo into this folder:

  Dyncamelo.App.dll        (the plugin entry — must sit directly in .\2024\)
  Dyncamelo.Core.dll
  Dyncamelo.Nodes.dll
  Dyncamelo.Navisworks.dll
  Dyncamelo.UI.dll
  Nodify.dll
  Newtonsoft.Json.dll

A Debug build does this automatically (see the DeployToBundle target in
src/Dyncamelo.App/Dyncamelo.App.csproj — it deploys straight into
%APPDATA%\Autodesk\ApplicationPlugins\Dyncamelo.bundle). For a manual install,
build the solution on Windows and copy the files above from
src/Dyncamelo.App/bin/<Configuration>/net48/ into this folder, then copy the
whole Dyncamelo.bundle folder to:

  %APPDATA%\Autodesk\ApplicationPlugins\        (per user)
  or
  C:\ProgramData\Autodesk\ApplicationPlugins\   (all users)

The en-US\Dyncamelo.xaml ribbon layout and Resources\ icons beside this file
are already in place — Navisworks shows Dyncamelo on the "BIMCamel" ribbon tab.
